sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 1g. saturated fat, cholesterol, and omega3 are doing most of the work. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole thing down.
sections.subtitleText: fat is 1g. saturated fat, cholesterol, and omega3 are doing most of the work. for dairy, the fat side can either add richness or drag the whole thing down.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 5g. sugar, glycemic index, and starch are doing most of the work. for dairy, the question is whether the payoff is worth the baggage.
sections.subtitleText: carbs is 5g. sugar, glycemic index, and starch are doing most of the work. for dairy, the question is whether the payoff is worth the baggage.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: protein is 90g. protein quality is a real strength here. useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits here.
sections.subtitleText: protein is 90g. protein quality is a real strength here. useful protein can rescue a lot of weaker traits here.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin b12 at 8% DV, vitamin a at 0% DV stand out most. that is barely moving the needle.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin b12 at 8% DV, vitamin a at 0% DV stand out most. that is barely moving the needle.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: calcium at 50% DV, zinc at 2% DV, magnesium at 6% DV stand out most. useful, but still not a major mineral edge.
sections.subtitleText: calcium at 50% DV, zinc at 2% DV, magnesium at 6% DV stand out most. useful, but still not a major mineral edge.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: pros first. easy protein delivery for normal diets because dairy gets real credit for convenience. clear calcium identity because that is a core category strength. slots into meals very easily because practical versatility matters a lot for dairy.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: now the downsides. very processed compared with whole dairy because it wins hard on protein, but it is not the same kind of food experience. fat quality varies wildly across dairy because some dairy is clean, some really is not. processing changes the category a lot because the label alone does not tell the whole story.

sections.subtitleText: now the downsides. very processed compared with whole dairy because it wins hard on protein, but it is not the same kind of food experience. fat quality varies wildly across dairy because some dairy is clean, some really is not. processing changes the category a lot because the label alone does not tell the whole story.

closing.summary: Whey Protein Isolate has a genuinely strong overall case, especially easy protein delivery for normal diets and clear calcium identity. the downsides are there, but very processed compared with whole dairy and fat quality varies wildly across dairy do not outweigh the upside. best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when the protein payoff or fermentation angle outweighs the fat and sodium tradeoffs.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?
